name: Far East Peanut Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the soy sauce and vinegar together and set aside.
2. In a bowl, mix the peanut butter with the sesame oil until thoroughly blended.
3. Add the chili paste and cayenne pepper to the mixture and blend well.
4. Blend in the soy sauce into the peanut mixture.
5. Finally, add the mayonnaise and stir until smooth.
6. Serve at room temperature.
Makes 1 1/4 cups of dipping sauce. Suggested dippers: Beef Satay, Shrimp, Crayfish, Sesame Crackers, Scallions, Cherry Tomatoes, Snow Peas
